author: Robby Sneiderman
name: SwiGLU + EMA + Int5 Quantization + EBLS Findings (Non-Record)
blurb: SwiGLU MLP replacing ReLU-squared, EMA replacing SWA, int5 quantization for all weight categories. Includes EBLS exploration: learned shrinkage gammas discover MLP weights converge to full sharing while attention retains trace specialization. TTT investigation: per-window adaptation degrades quality due to high gradient variance at batch_size=1.
